summary: Daily Story War (Phase A+B) testing complete. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: WarBanner on homepage with LIVE badge and countdown, DailyWarPage with war header/title/countdown/Enter War CTA/story prompt, ContinuationModal opens correctly for war entry, NotificationBell handles war_overtake/war_won/war_ended notification types with correct icons.
critical_code_review_comments: daily_war.py: Well-structured with proper state machine (scheduled→active→ended→winner_declared), deterministic tie-breaking (war_score > continues > shares > earlier entered_at), winner eligibility threshold (20+ views AND 1+ share/continue), and 30-min throttled overtake notifications

DailyWarPage.jsx: All data-testid attributes present (war-loading, war-empty, war-header, war-title, war-countdown, war-user-rank, enter-war-btn, war-leaderboard, war-entry-rank-{n}, war-winner-declaration, war-story-context, yesterday-reentry, overtake-alert)
WarBanner.jsx: Properly shows LIVE badge for active wars, countdown timer, entry count, and navigates to /app/war on click
NotificationBell.js: ICON_MAP correctly maps war_overtake=Flame, war_won=Trophy, war_ended=Target with appropriate COLOR_MAP styling
test_credentials: Admin: admin@creatorstudio.ai / Cr3@t0rStud!o#2026, Test User: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026#
seed_data_creation: Used existing wars: war-20260411-a2f60e (winner_declared, The Lost Temple of Echoes) and war-20260411-ffa067 (active, The Starship Paradox)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Story War Phase A+B fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/war/current returns active war with leaderboard, time_left_seconds, yesterday_rank for authenticated users, (2) GET /api/war/yesterday returns previous war results with user's rank computed dynamically, (3) GET /api/war/history returns past wars with winner info, (4) POST /api/war/enter validates title (min 3 chars) and story_text (min 50 chars), requires auth, rejects duplicates, (5) POST /api/war/increment-metric validates job_id and metric type (views/shares/continues), (6) Admin endpoints /api/war/admin/seed and /api/war/admin/end require admin role, (7) DailyWarPage at /app/war shows war header with countdown, Enter the War CTA (opens ContinuationModal), story prompt, (8) WarBanner on homepage /app shows DAILY STORY WAR with LIVE badge, countdown, entry count, navigates to /app/war on click, (9) NotificationBell shows war notifications: 'Today's Story War ended. You placed #2' (war_ended), 'You dropped to #2 in today's Story War' (war_overtake), (10) Current active war: 'The Starship Paradox' with ~24h remaining, 0 entries
